newsletter.markdown:
## News

**[U.S. health officials are investigating a new outbreak of a diarrhea-causing parasite](https://www.statnews.com/2026/07/23/cyclospora-second-outbreak-reported-fda-cites-72-new-cases/?utm_campaign=rss)** — STAT News  
- FDA reports 72 new cases in a second cyclospora outbreak under investigation  
- Parasite causes prolonged watery diarrhea; source not yet identified

**[STAT+: European regulators take steps to bolster clinical trial transparency](https://www.statnews.com/pharmalot/2026/07/23/european-medicines-agency-bolster-clinical-trials-transparency/?utm_campaign=rss)** — STAT Pharmalot  
- EMA taking “rapid action” to enforce public posting of clinical trial results as legally required  
- Advocacy groups describe the move as unexpectedly aggressive

**[STAT+: Popular insulin product enters shortage as other pens leave market](https://www.statnews.com/2026/07/23/sanofi-insulin-lantus-solostar-pen-reported-short-supply/?utm_campaign=rss)** — STAT Pharmalot  
- Lantus Solostar (insulin glargine) not on FDA’s official shortage list but widely unavailable at pharmacies  
- Supply pressure coincides with other insulin pen exits

**[Senate health panel delays vote on CDC nominee](https://www.statnews.com/2026/07/23/erica-schwartz-cdc-director-vote-delayed/?utm_campaign=rss)** — STAT News  
- Vote on Erica Schwartz for CDC director postponed due to insufficient senator attendance

**[STAT+: What’s in the last-minute flurry of health care bills?](https://www.statnews.com/2026/07/23/health-policy-news-today-dc-diagnosis-newsletter-john-wilkerson-3/?utm_campaign=rss)** — STAT News  
- Congress advancing multiple bills before August recess; priorities include price transparency and prior-authorization reform

**[Lilly, with new data, to seek FDA approval of obesity drug retatrutide](https://www.biopharmadive.com/news/lilly-retatrutide-fda-application-obesity-drug-results/825987/)** — BioPharma Dive  
- Triumph-2 (T2D cohort): 20.8% mean weight loss at 80 weeks (highest dose); Triumph-3 (established CVD ± T2D): 22.6% mean weight loss  
- Triple agonist (GLP-1, GIP, glucagon); Lilly targets Q1 2027 FDA filing, citing need for additional manufacturing/quality data  
- MACE-3 events numerically higher vs placebo in Triumph-3 (27 vs 23); MACE-5 favored treatment; small sample/short follow-up limit interpretation

## Papers & Preprints

**[Fully Automatable Relative Binding Free Energy Calculations with Enhanced Sampling Using FAST/MBAR](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42490053/)** — PubMed  
- Method paper describing a fully automatable pipeline for relative binding free-energy calculations using FAST enhanced sampling and MBAR analysis

**[Metagenomic screening of antimicrobial peptide candidates and isolation of two active peptides from bat gut bacteria](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42489979/)** — PubMed  
- Metagenomic mining of bat gut microbiota yields two antimicrobial peptides with demonstrated activity

**[Zebrafish as a versatile model in biomedical research, from disease modeling to regenerative medicine: a review](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42489951/)** — PubMed  
- Review covering zebrafish utility across disease modeling, drug screening, and regenerative medicine applications

**[From synaptic development to degeneration: a narrative review of small molecule strategies targeting alpha-synuclein in Parkinson's disease](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42489942/)** — PubMed  
- Narrative review summarizing small-molecule approaches targeting α-synuclein aggregation, toxicity, and clearance in PD

**[7-azaindole as privileged scaffold: Advances in drug design and structural modification](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42489892/)** — PubMed  
- Review of 7-azaindole scaffold applications in medicinal chemistry, including structural modifications and target profiles

**[From reagents to feedstocks: reprogramming heteroatom-containing molecules in modern organic synthesis](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42489830/)** — PubMed  
- Review on strategies to repurpose heteroatom-rich reagents as synthetic feedstocks for complex molecule assembly

**[PAK4 in the Tumor Immune Microenvironment: Biological Functions, Regulatory Mechanisms, and Targeted Therapeutic Strategies](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42489806/)** — PubMed  
- Review of PAK4’s role in immune modulation within the TME and progress on PAK4-targeted therapeutic approaches

**[Recent advances in EGFR-targeted therapies for non-small cell lung cancer](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42489649/)** — PubMed  
- Review covering latest EGFR inhibitors, resistance mechanisms, and combination strategies in NSCLC

**[Drug Discovery of Allosteric Molecular Glue Degraders (aMGDs): Expanding the Landscape of Targeted Protein Degradation](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42489503/)** — PubMed  
- Review on allosteric molecular glue degraders as an emerging modality in targeted protein degradation

**[Consistent Quantitative Reporting in Medicinal Chemistry](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42489501/)** — PubMed  
- Perspective/article advocating standardized quantitative reporting practices for medicinal chemistry data

**[Discovery of a Novel Tripeptide Linker that Broadens the Therapeutic Window of Auristatin-Based Antibody-Drug Conjugates by Reducing Bone Marrow Toxicity](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42489321/)** — PubMed  
- New tripeptide linker reduces bone marrow toxicity of auristatin ADCs, widening therapeutic index

**[Chemical studies on novel functional secondary metabolites from mushroom-forming fungi](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42489308/)** — PubMed  
- Isolation and characterization of bioactive secondary metabolites from basidiomycete fungi

**[Synergistic Spin-Polarization Effect and Magnetic Exchange Interaction of Core/Shell Structure for Bifunctional Oxygen Electrocatalysis](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42489154/)** — PubMed  
- Materials science study on core/shell electrocatalysts for oxygen reduction/evolution; peripheral to drug discovery

**[A unified deep generative framework for surrogate-guided molecular discovery across diverse molecular spaces](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42489113/)** — PubMed  
- Deep generative model for de novo molecular design guided by surrogate predictors across chemical spaces

**[A Comprehensive (19)F NMR Framework for Fragment-Based Drug Discovery: The Validated Screening Library OpenFL600 and Efficient Affinity Ranking by CSAR](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/42489106/)** — PubMed  
- 19F NMR fragment screening platform with validated 600-compound library (OpenFL600) and CSAR affinity ranking method

## X / Twitter

**[@bradloncar: BiotechTV's inaugural U.S. Science Summit](https://x.com/bradloncar/status/2080281805656064134)** — Brad Loncar  
- Event convened science communicators, biotech leaders (MassBio, Kymera, Alnylam, former FDA officials) to discuss storytelling and ecosystem building

**[@JacobPlieth: Roche discontinues RG6468 (RO7566802); mechanism undisclosed](https://x.com/JacobPlieth/status/2080198443516002483)** — Jacob Plieth  
- RG6468 terminated; not a CDK4/2 inhibitor as previously speculated

**[@JacobPlieth: Roche also discontinues mosperafenib, a “paradox-breaker” BRAF inhibitor](https://x.com/JacobPlieth/status/2080199693003272395)** — Jacob Plieth  
- Mosperafenib halted; relevant comparator to Haisco’s HSK42360/NXP200 (acquired by Nuvalent/NVCT last month)

**[@JacobPlieth: GSK’s Jideytro (new brand/asset mention)](https://x.com/JacobPlieth/status/2079977673938325848)** — Jacob Plieth  
- Brief reference to GSK asset “Jideytro”; details not provided in tweet

**[@BioStocks: Oppenheimer initiates Pali (PALI) Outperform, PT $8](https://x.com/BioStocks/status/2080246521388298474)** — BioStocks  
- Analyst initiation; no clinical detail in tweet

**[@BioStocks: Lilly retatrutide Triumph-2/3 topline highlights](https://x.com/BioStocks/status/2080243564064211244)** — BioStocks  
- Echoes Phase 3 weight-loss and A1c improvements; triple agonist vs Novo’s GLP-1 monotherapy

**[@BioStocks: Triumph-2/3 numeric weight-loss figures](https://x.com/BioStocks/status/2080244054814511537)** — BioStocks  
- Triumph-2: up to 49.6 lbs (20.8%) at 80 wks; Triumph-3: up to 55.8 lbs (22.6%) at 80 wks

**[@BioStocks: Cantor initiates Dyne (DYN) Overweight](https://x.com/BioStocks/status/2080239840323424260)** — BioStocks  
- Analyst initiation; no clinical detail in tweet

**[@BioStocks: Liquidia (LQDA) PT raised to $101 on UTHR patent-case developments](https://x.com/BioStocks/status/2080037422339879081)** — BioStocks  
- Judge questions United Therapeutics’ candor in ’327 patent case; increases likelihood Yutrepia avoids skinny label

**[@BioStocks: Lyra (LBRX) accelerates NOVA-2 Phase 3 topline for LB-102 in schizophrenia to 1H’27](https://x.com/BioStocks/status/2079899761528676523)** — BioStocks  
- Topline data now expected first half 2027

**[@BioStocks: Monopar (MNPR) initiates rolling NDA for ALXN1840 in Wilson disease](https://x.com/BioStocks/status/2079899472885117329)** — BioStocks  
- Rolling submission underway for copper-chelating candidate

**[@BioStocks: Canaccord initiates Nektar (NKTR) Buy, PT $153](https://x.com/BioStocks/status/2079873710224212029)** — BioStocks  
- Analyst initiation; no clinical detail in tweet

**[@BioStocks: Repligen (RGEN) to acquire BioLife (BLFS) for $31/share ($11.25 cash + 0.144 RGEN shares)](https://x.com/BioStocks/status/2079869883299295250)** — BioStocks  
- Definitive agreement; strategic combination in bioprocessing

---

**Worth watching:** Roche’s quiet termination of two oncology assets (RG6468, mosperafenib) may signal pipeline reprioritization; Repligen/BioLife deal reshapes bioprocessing supply chain; retatrutide’s cardiovascular safety signal (MACE-3) warrants scrutiny in upcoming CVOT.
newsletter.subject: Knowledge Secretary — 2026-07-23

youtube.markdown:
- Pure Science
    - [The Math That Connects Three Levels of Reality](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/lqOsxjV0UEI) -- Quanta Magazine
        - Mathematicians Yu Deng, Zaher Hani, and Xiao Ma resolved a major component of Hilbert's sixth problem, the 125-year-old program to derive macroscopic physical laws from microscopic dynamics with full mathematical rigor.  
        - The proof establishes the Boltzmann–Grad limit for the hard-sphere particle system, showing that the many-body Newtonian dynamics of colliding molecules converges to the Boltzmann equation on short timescales.  
        - A key technical innovation is the control of pathological "recollision" clusters via a new combinatorial–geometric expansion that quantifies the measure of bad trajectories in the Lanford hierarchy.  
        - The result bridges three levels of description: deterministic particle mechanics, the statistical Boltzmann equation, and the hydrodynamic Euler/Navier–Stokes equations, thereby rigorously deriving fluid behavior from microscopic collisions.  
        - The work, posted as arXiv:2503.01800, was cited in the award of the 2026 Fields Medal to Yu Deng.
- Other
    - [Volcanoes Explained: Crash Course Geology #13](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BMZbbewOLvU) -- CrashCourse
        - Volcanoes are defined as geological features where magma, gases, and tephra are extruded from the Earth's crust onto the surface.
        - Volcanic activity is primarily driven by plate tectonics, occurring at divergent boundaries where plates move apart, subduction zones where one plate is forced under another, and mantle plumes (hotspots) where localized upwelling occurs.
        - Magma composition, specifically its silica content and viscosity, significantly influences eruption styles, ranging from effusive flows to highly explosive events.
        - The geological impact and risk of eruptions vary based on the volcano type, such as shield volcanoes versus stratovolcanoes, and the specific chemical composition of the erupting material.
